assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures OpenIdConnectEvents on the OIDC handler
assertions.rationale: The response configures 'options.Events = new OpenIdConnectEvents { ... }' on the OIDC handler.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets OnRedirectToIdentityProvider to add AcrValues = 'tenant:myorg' to the ProtocolMessage
assertions.rationale: The response uses context.ProtocolMessage.SetParameter("acr_values", "tenant:myorg") which effectively sets AcrValues.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets OnRemoteFailure to call context.HandleResponse() and redirect to /auth-error
assertions.rationale: The response includes context.HandleResponse() and context.Response.Redirect("/auth-error") in OnRemoteFailure.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs passes login_hint via context.ProtocolMessage.LoginHint or SetParameter in the OnRedirectToIdentityProvider event
assertions.rationale: The response uses context.ProtocolMessage.SetParameter("login_hint", "user@example.com") which is an acceptable alternative to the LoginHint property.
